channel.title: News on BioML
channel.description: Recent content in News on BioML

item.title: NNF grant
item.description: Ole Winther, Professor, Aasa Feragen-Hauberg, Søren Hauberg, Jes Frellsen, Anders Krogh and Wouter Boomsma received a prestigious grant from the Novo Nordisk Foundation (NNF) for collaborative research!
